title: Arraches Lore
description: A warm gathering place for larpers to share stories, organize adventures, and swap character lore.
gallery_hint: Our collection of shared scenes, character portraits, and narrative moments.
gallery_instructions: Place your images in public/arraches_themes and use the exact file names provided.
gallery_subtitle: Discover shared scenes and character portraits
feature1_desc: Rich bronze tones, gentle textures, and geometric flourishes create a mood that feels handcrafted and ceremonial.
feature2_desc: Every section is designed to showcase members, gatherings, and shared stories with warmth and authenticity.
feature3_desc: Events and discussions are presented like chapter openings in a guild epic, with elegant detail and cinematic rhythm.
login_subtitle: Welcome back to the Guild of Arraches
register_subtitle: Create your account to participate in the Arraches community
forum_login_gate_msg: You need to be signed in to read and participate in threads.
forum_reply_disabled: Sign in to post a reply
event1_description: Gather around the fire for shared tales and quest planning.
event2_description: A rare exchange of props, artifacts, and narrative hooks.
event3_description: Hands-on crafting for costume detail and story mechanics.
